prose: **Ethylene frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (exact four-center integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on user-supplied ethylene.xyz (no geometry optimization). SCF converged in 6 cycles; no warnings reported. HOMO = −7.6155818 eV, LUMO = −0.17986527 eV → gap = 7.4357165 eV (Koopmans-style).  Reproducibility:  • Command:   /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp0rjghk71/live.json  • JSON output: /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp0rjghk71/live.json  • Live log: frontier_<timestamp>.out (written to working directory; can be tailed)
